details.test: Task 1: Book cheapest plumber under $120 within 5 miles and evening slot
Task 2: Schedule handyman for 3 small tasks under $200 on Saturday morning
Task 3: Choose and favorite better provider by rate and 5-star reviews
Task 4: Create account and set notification preferences
Task 5: Apply new-customer plumbing coupon to sink repair under $100
Task 6: Request painting quote for 150 sq ft living room with 3 time slots
Task 7: Reschedule existing booking to later afternoon with same provider
Task 8: Add a standard service option to cart and verify cart contents
Task 9: Contact support with billing question linked to past booking
